llm_eval.notes: genuine code-review (task-graph producer build + 30思考法検証文脈)。compile OK / # /// script frontmatter 完備。task-state.json の C16 schema 整合 + graph_hash pin 整合を手書き検査。条件付き必須 (running→lease / blocked→blocked_reason) + 永続 state 4値 (computed-only の ready を fail-closed 拒否) + graph_hash pin 再計算照合。consumer C07 が pin 検証 subprocess として消費。TESTS: test_check_task_state_schema.py 22 PASS。
